recommendations.title: What Happened, Miss Simone?
recommendations.overview: The film chronicles Nina Simone's journey from child piano prodigy to iconic musician and passionate activist, told in her own words.

recommendations.title: Four Minutes
recommendations.overview: Jenny is young. Her life is over. She killed someone. And she would do it again. When an 80-year-old piano teacher discovers the girl’s secret, her brutality and her dreams, she decides to transform her pupil into the musical wunderkind she once was.

recommendations.title: Secret
recommendations.overview: Ye Xiang Lun, a talented piano player is a new student at the prestigious Tamkang School. On his first day, he meets Lu Xiao Yu, a pretty girl playing a mysterious piece of music.

recommendations.title: Chico & Rita
recommendations.overview: Chico is a young piano player with big dreams. Rita is a beautiful singer with an extraordinary voice. Music and romantic desire unites them, but their journey - in the tradition of the Latin ballad, the bolero - brings heartache and torment.
recommendations.director: Tono Errando, Fernando Trueba, Javier Mariscal

recommendations.title: The Music Box
recommendations.overview: The Laurel & Hardy Moving Co. have a challenging job on their hands (and backs): hauling a player piano up a monumental flight of stairs to Prof. von Schwarzenhoffen's house. Their task is complicated by a sassy nursemaid and, unbeknownst to them, th

recommendations.title: Lommbock
recommendations.overview: Sequel to Lammbock. Stefan and Kai meet again after years. Stefan became a successful lawyer in Dubai while Kai is stuck in their home town. Kai has relationship issues and is trying hard to get in touch with his step son who is getting in serious tr

recommendations.title: A Silent Voice: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Shouya Ishida starts bullying the new girl in class, Shouko Nishimiya, because she is deaf. But as the teasing continues, the rest of the class starts to turn on Shouya for his lack of compassion. When they leave elementary school, Shouko and Shouya

recommendations.title: Jack Frusciante è uscito dal gruppo
recommendations.overview: Alex, a high-school boy fond of rock and punk music, falls in love with Adelaide, who shares his feelings but doesn't want to get too involved because she will soon leave for studying in America. Alex gets relief in music and his friend Martino who l

recommendations.title: Lisbon Story
recommendations.overview: Wim Wenders' homage to Lisbon and films. A sound engineer obtains a mysterious postcard from a friend who at the moment is filming a film in Lisbon. He sets out across Europe to find him and help him.

recommendations.title: Lu Over the Wall
recommendations.overview: In a small fishing village, a gloomy middle school student named Kai meets a mermaid named Lu.
